bastion_strike.name: Bastion Strike
bastion_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A protective strike that prepares your defense. Generates 20 Stamina and 1 Shield Pip.

interpose.name: Interpose
interpose.description: Setup: Step between a foe and an ally. Generates 1 Shield Pip and applies [Marked] to the foe.

shield_slam.name: Shield Slam
shield_slam.description: Payoff: A thunderous slam that shatters balance. Consumes 5 Shield Pips to deal Physical damage and apply [Stunned] for 3 ticks.

iron_curtain.name: Iron Curtain
iron_curtain.description: Payoff: Create a wall of force. Consumes 3 Shield Pips to reduce all incoming damage in the room by 40% for 4 ticks.

invulnerability_stance.name: Invulnerability Stance
invulnerability_stance.description: Defense: Become an immovable object. You take 90% reduced damage but cannot move or act.

shield_swipe.name: Shield Swipe
shield_swipe.description: Defense/Disruption: Swipe your shield in a wide arc. Knocks back all enemies in front of you.

guardian_rush.name: Guardian Rush
guardian_rush.description: Mobility: Rush to the side of an ally instantly.

sacred_bond.name: Sacred Bond
sacred_bond.description: Utility/Signature: Link your health with all allies in the room. You take all damage dealt to them for 10 ticks.

guardian_physiology.name: Guardian Physiology
guardian_physiology.description: Passive: Living Wall. You gain 20% increased Health and your armor rating is doubled when stationary.
